x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist configuration requires the sn_now_assist.admin role. Without it, admins cannot configure prompts, manage AI interactions, or adjust Now Assist settings -- blocking all Now Assist setup work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Assign the sn_now_assist.admin role to Now Assist configuration administrators via sys_user_has_role_list.do. Limit this role to designated AI platform administrators. This role is required to configure all Now Assist features.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist configuration requires the sn_now_assist.admin role. Without it, admins cannot configure prompts, manage AI interactions, or adjust Now Assist settings -- blocking all Now Assist setup work.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist Admin Role Assignment</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_user_has_role');
    ga.addQuery('role.name', 'sn_now_assist.admin');
    ga.addQuery('inherited', false);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' user(s) with sn_now_assist.admin role';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' user(s) have the sn_now_assist.admin role. Now Assist configuration access is in place — administrators can configure prompts and AI interaction settings.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No users have the sn_now_assist.admin role. This role is required to configure Now Assist prompts and AI interaction settings — without it no Now Assist setup work can proceed.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000496</number><order>170</order><remediation_guidance>Assign the sn_now_assist.admin role to Now Assist configuration administrators via sys_user_has_role_list.do. Limit this role to designated AI platform administrators. This role is required to configure all Now Assist features.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist Admin Role Assignment</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
